version_description: Attempt to capture chords to mimic the motion of the official lyric video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qop5XLgwkNc.

versions.version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/Qop5XLgwkNc.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Attempt to capture chords to mimic the motion of the official lyric video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qop5XLgwkNc

The notes in parentheses are individual walking notes. You can choose to add that extra motion
or skip the notes in parentheses.

[tab]For example, in the places where I have (D B A G) after a G chord, I play it like this:
   G([ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
e|-----------|
B|-----0-----|
G|------h2p0-|
D|---0-------|
A|-----------|
E|-3---------|[/tab]

For the D/F# chords, the important thing is the walking F# note on the low E string. If you don't
want to play a full D/F#, you can just do the walkup from the Em7 to the G5 by passing through what
Oolimo describes as Dadd11/F# (2x0033).


[Chords]
[ch]Em7[/ch]    022033
[ch]Dadd11[/ch] x5403x
[ch]C[/ch]      x32010
[ch]G[/ch]      3x0003
[ch]G5[/ch]     3x0033
[ch]D/F#[/ch]   2x0232


[Intro]
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Dadd11[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
I am not okay[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm barely getting by[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
I'm losing track of days[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]   ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
And losing sleep at night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
I am not okay[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G5[/ch]
I'm hanging on the rails[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
So if I say I'm fine[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Just know I learned to hide it well[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Dadd11[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 I know I can't be the only one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dadd11[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
 Who's holding on for dear li-ife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
 But God knows, I know[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  ([ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
When it's all said and done[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
I'm not okay[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G5[/ch]
But it's all gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
It's not okay[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But we're all gonna be alright[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Dadd11[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])


[Verse 2]
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
I woke up today[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G5[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
I almost stayed in bed[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
Had the devil on my back[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]  ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
And voices in my head[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G5[/ch]
Some days it ain't all bad[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Some days it all gets worse[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
Some days I swear I'm better off[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Layin' in that dirt[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Dadd11[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 I know I can't be the only one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dadd11[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
 Who's holding on for dear li-ife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
 But God knows, I know[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  ([ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
When it's all said and done[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
I'm not okay[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]    ([ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
But it's all gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
It's not okay[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But we're all gonna be alright[/tab]


[Post Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dadd11[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Gonna bе all right[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dadd11[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Gonna be all right[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
I know one day[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
We'll see the other side[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
The pain'll wash away[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G5[/ch]
In a holy water tide[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
And we all gonna be alright[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Dadd11[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 I know I can't be the only one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dadd11[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
 Who's holding on for dear li-ife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
 But God knows, I know[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  ([ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
When it's all said and done[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
I'm not okay[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
But it's all gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
It's not okay[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
But we're all gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Dadd11[/ch]
I'm not okay[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But it's all gonna be alright[/tab]



************************************

| h  Hammer-on
| p  Pull-off
